content.question: What portion of the implementation crunch in Poland's 2016–2017 structural reform (double cohorts, placement failures) was avoidable through sequencing and capacity planning, and how would the cost of avoiding it compare to the political cost of delaying reform?
content.reduction_path: Comparative case analysis of other countries' school structural reforms with different implementation timelines; cost-benefit modeling of phased versus rapid implementation with sensitivity analysis on capacity elasticity; expert retrospective assessment of feasibility of alternative sequencing under Polish 2015 political constraints
